name: star-citizen-interactive-map-starter
description: Static 3D/2D Star Citizen route, commodity-run, and live UEX location map for GitHub Pages

scripts.validate: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/router.js && node --check src/map-2d.js && node --check src/map-3d.js && node --check scripts/update-universe-data.mjs && node --check scripts/update-trade-data.mjs
